task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct report name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Report Name' field on the Add Report page in OrangeHRM contains 'Engineering Payroll'.

task_completion.description: The agent set the selection criteria to filter by the correct job title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Selection Criteria section, 'Job Title' is selected and set to 'Software Engineer'.

task_completion.description: The agent added the required display fields to the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Display Fields section lists Employee Id, First Name, Last Name, and Basic Salary as selected fields to be included in the report.

task_completion.description: The report is generated and displays the correct employee data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated report page showing the columns Employee Id, First Name, Last Name, and Basic Salary, with a row for 'Alice Dev' and a salary of '85000'.

task_completion.description: The report is exported as a CSV file to the Downloads folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's download manager shows a completed CSV download, or a file manager window shows the exported CSV file in the '/home/ga/Downloads' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrangeHRM web interface to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OrangeHRM PIM Reports GUI, rather than terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: The CSV file was exported using the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'CSV' export button on the generated report page, rather than manually creating a file in a text editor or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the employee details into a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent typing 'Alice Dev' or '85000' into a text editor or spreadsheet application to fake the export.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target report name is 'Engineering Payroll'. The selection criteria must be Job Title = 'Software Engineer'. The display fields must include Employee Id, First Name, Last Name, and Basic Salary. The generated report should contain the employee 'Alice Dev' with a basic salary of '85000'. The final CSV file must be downloaded to '/home/ga/Downloads'.
